pages.text: Before any furnace, your tools are bone and stone. Striking flint produces sharp flakes — a &6flint blade&r — which carves a Crafting Stone and cuts where bare hands cannot. This is the bone age's working edge.

The &6Knapping&r research unlocks the full stone tool set: stone pickaxe, axe, sword, shovel, hoe, and spear. It also advances the settlement to the stone tool age, so your workers may finally equip stone.
Stone tools are slower and weaker than the iron that comes later, but they are the bridge from a scavenging camp to a settlement that can quarry, build, and arm itself in earnest.
